title: Copper Torch Tweak
description: Tweaks the Copper Torch's texture to look more appealing.
body:
**

Copper Torch Tweak is a small pack that ever so slightly tweaks the Copper Torch's texture to make it look more appealing, by giving the torch the Copper Lantern's fire colors.** _

if you'd like to use assets from this pack, or anything else I made, let me know about it and please credit the pack somewhere somewhat obvious, like a description or credits area._ **

Made by TeamChar1ie (me)**\ **

Check out my other projects [Here!](https://modrinth.com/user/TChar1ie)**
